title: Agnes Tachyon Totem by Cryngel
description: This resource pack changes the texture of the totem to the image of the character 'Agnes Tachyon' from 'Uma Musume'
body:
![art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdff521c713862cbe0be5550b9070f8c54f4db63.png) 

# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the texture of the totem to the art "Agnes Tachyon" from "Uma Musume".

Perfect for fans of this anime.

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
